title: Django Workshop
description: The IEEE DBIT Computer Society conducted a two-day Django Full-Stack Web Development Workshop on 5th and 6th March 2026. Led by industry expert Mr. Shripad Kulkarni, the workshop provided over 100 participants with hands-on experience in building real-world web applications using Django. The session covered backend development, database integration, models, views, templates, and full-stack project development, along with hackathon-style teamwork, debugging, and deployment practices to equip students with industry-ready skills.
